com.renquant.monthly-meta-label-retrain.reason: DIAGNOSED via supervised re-run 07-17: the leakage guard CORRECTLY refuses the snapshot sim — its fixed 12-mo window (ending T-60d) now always predates the active model's trained_date (2026-06-21), i.e. replaying the past with a future-trained model is look-ahead by construction. Worked pre-July only because the then-active vintage happened to predate the window end. Design defect in the job (model-vintage vs window), not in the guard; redesign = task #75.
com.renquant.monthly-meta-label-retrain.clears_when: job redesigned to sim with as-of model vintages (or window redefined) — task #75
